# grantCapability(_:)

**Instance Method**

Grants the specified capability to the process.

## Declaration

```swift
func grantCapability(_ capability: ProcessCapability) throws -> ProcessCapability.Grant
```

## Parameters

- **capability**: The capability to grant.

## Return Value

A [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/ProcessCapability/Grant] object that represents the granted capability.

## Overview

When the web content process no longer needs the capability, call [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/ProcessCapability/Grant/invalidate()] on the returned object.

## Coordinating processes

- **grantCapability(_:invalidationHandler:)**: Grants the specified capability to the process, calling the handler when the capability becomes invalid.
- **createVisibilityPropagationInteraction()**: Returns an interaction that associates a view with the web content process.
